description_long: This is a two-story brick pub with a flat, concrete roof and a distinctive wedge-shaped footprint, reminiscent of a corner building. The facade features large rectangular windows on the upper floor and a prominent entrance below, framed by thick concrete columns. The ground floor has a dark, recessed main entryway with double doors and a large, roll-up style window or shutter to one side. A black and gold sign reading 'PUB' is mounted above the entrance, with an additional projecting sign on the side. The brickwork is interspersed with concrete or stone structural elements, giving the building a robust, industrial appearance. The rear and side walls are mostly unadorned, with minimal fenestration and a utilitarian look.
description: A wedge-shaped, two-story brick pub with a flat concrete roof, large front windows, and prominent signage. The facade is accented by concrete columns and a dark, recessed main entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, large windows, and 'PUB' signage above, framed by concrete columns.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the upper row of windows, brickwork, and the building's wedge-shaped footprint.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain brick wall with minimal features and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the projecting 'PUB' sign, roll-up window/shutter, and structural concrete framing.
attribute_signage: There is a wall-mounted rectangular sign above the main entrance with gold 'PUB' lettering on a black background, and a projecting rectangular sign with the same text and color scheme on the right side of the building.
attribute_entrance_design: One main entrance is visible at the front, consisting of double wooden doors set within a recessed area framed by thick concrete columns. The entrance is wide and rectangular, with a large transom window above and a roll-up style window or shutter adjacent to it.
attribute_window_arrangement: The upper floor features a row of evenly spaced rectangular windows on the front and angled side. The rear wall has no visible windows, and the ground floor has large windows flanking the entrance.
attribute_architectural_style: Industrial/Urban with utilitarian brickwork, concrete framing, and minimal decorative elements, typical of early-to-mid 20th century commercial corner buildings.
